use_cases: Scheduling appointments in healthcare or service booking applications
Setting time-based reminders or alarms in productivity tools
Recording time spent on tasks for time tracking and billing
Configuring delivery or pickup windows in e-commerce platforms
Managing availability slots in booking and reservation systems
ai_summary: A time picker input component for selecting hours and minutes in a user-friendly interface. Features clean, minimal styling with accessible focus states and keyboard navigation support. Designed for integration across desktop and mobile platforms, commonly used in scheduling, booking, and time-tracking applications.
